Name Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall staff names and faces. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
109 C0900D_RCALL_NH_CD C0900D_RCALL_NH_CD C0900D Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls Nursing Home Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall that they are in a nursing home. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked
